scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,diff -c blue,green,magenta "cd server && bun run dev" "cd client && bun run dev" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run dev"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n server,client,diff -c blue,green,magenta "cd server && bun run typecheck" "cd client && bun run typecheck" "cd cardinal-diff && bun run typecheck"
